Our Story

ABOUT HARDIK —
CERTIFIED FITNESS
COACH IN AHMEDABAD

The Coach

Internationally
Certified
Trainer

Hardik is an internationally certified personal trainer with REPS-ICREPS & NSQF accreditation. With expertise in strength training, fat loss transformation, and performance coaching, he designs customized programs tailored to every individual's unique goals.

Based in Chandkheda, Ahmedabad, Hardik has helped hundreds of clients across Gujarat achieve dramatic transformations — from competitive fat loss to serious muscle gain and athletic performance. His approach is rooted in science, structured programming, and genuine accountability.

"Discipline is the bridge between your current self and the body you are working toward."

— Hardik's Training Philosophy

His training philosophy focuses on three pillars: discipline in consistency, adherence to science-based programming, and long-term sustainable fitness results.

REPS-ICREPS

International Register of Exercise Professionals — globally recognized certification

NSQF Level

National Skills Qualification Framework — India's government-recognized fitness credential

Personal Trainer

Certified in strength training, fat loss, and body recomposition coaching

International

Internationally trained — bringing global standards to Ahmedabad clients

Train With Hardik

What We Offer

FITNESS COACHING
PROGRAMS

01

Fat Loss
Transformation

Hardik's fat loss coaching program combines progressive overload strength training with strategic nutrition guidance to create a sustainable caloric deficit — without sacrificing muscle. A structured, science-backed system for lasting physique change across Ahmedabad and Gujarat.

Strength TrainingNutrition StrategyProgressive OverloadWeekly Tracking
Enquire Now
02

Muscle Gain
Program

Built on proven hypertrophy principles, this program maximizes muscle fiber recruitment, optimizes training volume, and prioritizes recovery. Hardik customizes every mesocycle to ensure you are consistently progressing and building a powerful, aesthetic physique.

Hypertrophy ProtocolVolume ManagementRecovery OptimizationBody Recomposition
Enquire Now
03

Strength &
Conditioning

Designed for those who want raw, functional strength and athletic performance. Hardik's strength & conditioning programs incorporate foundational powerlifting movements, progressive loading, and conditioning work — ideal for athletes and anyone who wants to lift more and perform at a higher level.

Powerlifting FoundationsAthletic PerformanceFunctional MovementMobility Work
Enquire Now
04

Personalized
Diet Guidance

Training is only half the equation. Hardik provides comprehensive, individualized dietary guidance aligned with your training goals — surplus for muscle gain, deficit for fat loss, or maintenance for recomposition. No generic meal plans. Everything built specifically for you.

Macro ProgrammingMeal TimingSupplement GuidanceCustom Meal Plans
Enquire Now
05

Online
Coaching

Get the same elite coaching experience from anywhere in India. Includes a fully customized training plan, diet programming, weekly video check-ins, form video reviews, and direct WhatsApp access for ongoing support. Distance is no barrier to transformation.

Remote CoachingVideo Check-insWhatsApp SupportPan-India Available
